CustomField.description: This field is populated by L.FLOW 8660 and will be the timestamp when to send any next auto replies. This value is completed when an email message is caught in a loop and we need to prevent too many auto replies. C.META Emial Throttle settings are used to set the pause time.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If this is filled in, auto replies will not get triggered or out until after this time.
CustomField.label: fxAutoreply After
